ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cisco-Talos/clamav
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cisco-Talos/clamav
Language: c
ClamAV - Documentation is here: https://docs.clamav.net

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS-Kernel
Language: c
FreeRTOS kernel files only, submoduled into https://github.com/FreeRTOS/FreeRTOS and various other repos.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenEtherCATsociety/SOEM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenEtherCATsociety/SOEM
Language: c
Simple Open Source EtherCAT Master

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WeebLabs/DSPi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WeebLabs/DSPi
Language: c
A fully featured audio DSP firmware for the Raspberry Pi Pico (RP2040) and Pico 2 (RP2350). Official Discord: https://discord.gg/RCyqxAQ5xS

ns0:entry.ns0:title: analogdevicesinc/linux
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/analogdevicesinc/linux
Language: c
Linux kernel variant from Analog Devices; see README.md for details

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dorianborian/sesame-robot
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dorianborian/sesame-robot
Language: c
An open and affordable mini quadruped robot based on ESP32.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: eclipse-threadx/threadx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/eclipse-threadx/threadx
Language: c
Eclipse ThreadX is an advanced real-time operating system (RTOS) designed specifically for deeply embedded applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: espressif/esp-drone
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/espressif/esp-drone
Language: c
Mini Drone/Quadcopter Firmware for ESP32 and ESP32-S Series SoCs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hathach/tinyusb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hathach/tinyusb
Language: c
An open source cross-platform USB stack for embedded system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: libretro/RetroArch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/libretro/RetroArch
Language: c
Cross-platform, sophisticated frontend for the libretro API. Licensed GPLv3.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: madler/zlib
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/madler/zlib
Language: c
A massively spiffy yet delicately unobtrusive compression library.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nanopb/nanopb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nanopb/nanopb
Language: c
Protocol Buffers with small code size

ns0:entry.ns0:title: netdata/netdata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/netdata/netdata
Language: c
The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-quantum-safe/liboqs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-quantum-safe/liboqs
Language: c
C library for prototyping and experimenting with quantum-resistant cryptography

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open62541/open62541
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open62541/open62541
Language: c
Open source implementation of OPC UA (OPC Unified Architecture) aka IEC 62541 licensed under Mozilla Public License v2.0

ns0:entry.ns0:title: paxx12/SnapmakerU1-Extended-Firmware
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/paxx12/SnapmakerU1-Extended-Firmware
Language: c
Custom and repackaged Snapmaker U1 firmware

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pgbackrest/pgbackrest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pgbackrest/pgbackrest
Language: c
Reliable PostgreSQL Backup & Restore

ns0:entry.ns0:title: redis/redis
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/redis/redis
Language: c
For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server, and document and vector query engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ufrisk/pcileech
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ufrisk/pcileech
Language: c
Direct Memory Access (DMA) Attack Software

ns0:entry.ns0:title: valkey-io/valkey
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/valkey-io/valkey
Language: c
A flexible distributed key-value database that is optimized for caching and other realtime workloads.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: winsiderss/systeminformer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/winsiderss/systeminformer
Language: c
A free, powerful, multi-purpose tool that helps you monitor system resources, debug software and detect malware. Brought to you by Winsider Seminars & Solutions, Inc. @ http://www.windows-internals.com

ns0:entry.ns0:title: yugabyte/yugabyte-db
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/yugabyte/yugabyte-db
Language: c
YugabyteDB - the cloud native distributed SQL database for mission-critical applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zephyrproject-rtos/zephyr
Language: c
Primary Git Repository for the Zephyr Project. Zephyr is a new generation, scalable, optimized, secure RTOS for multiple hardware architectures.
